37) How to know where the mutual fund scheme has invested the money mobilized from 
investors? 
The mutual funds are required to disclose full portfolios of all of their schemes on a monthly basis 
on their website and on the website of AMFI within 10 days from the close of each month/ half-
year respectively in a user-friendly and downloadable spreadsheet format. For debt schemes,
